ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the individual (hashed for security) */,
  "mbti_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MBTI type of the individual */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the individual */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the individual */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the individual's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_mbti_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mbti_type_id") REFERENCES mbti_types ("mbti_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mbti_types" (
  "mbti_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MBTI type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the MBTI type (e.g., INTJ, ENTP) */,
  "descriptor" TEXT /* Descriptor of the MBTI type (e.g., Intellectual, Designer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MBTI type */,
  "energy" TEXT /* Indicates whether the MBTI type is Extraverted (E) or Introverted (I) */,
  "information" TEXT /* Indicates whether the MBTI type is Sensing (S) or Intuitive (N) */,
  "decisions" TEXT /* Indicates whether the MBTI type is Thinking (T) or Feeling (F) */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Indicates whether the MBTI type is Judging (J) or Perceiving (P) */,
  "common_traits" TEXT /* Common traits associated with the MBTI type */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Strengths of the MBTI type */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the MBTI type */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* MBTI types that are most compatible with this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MBTI type was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MBTI type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mbti_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "individual1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual in the match */,
  "individual2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual in the match */,
  "compatibility_score" REAL /* Compatibility score between the two individuals (range: 0-1) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_individual1_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual1_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_individual2_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual2_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_history" (
  "match_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match history entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
